title: Sh@'altiy'el #7597
definition:
Shealtiel or Salathiel = "I have asked of God"

 1) father of Zerubbabel
 2) son of king Jehoiachin or Jeconiah or Coniah of Judah and uncle of
    Zerubbabel
nasbUsage:
Definition: Shealtiel or Salathiel = "I have asked of God"

 1) father of Zerubbabel
 2) son of king Jehoiachin or Jeconiah or Coniah of Judah and uncle of
    Zerubbabel

    NASB:  I have asked of God, an Isr. name
